title: MD
biography: Maamoun Ghaibeh is a Syrian physician and humanitarian who provided medical care in conflict zones during the Syrian civil war, training field medics and performing surgery in besieged areas.
aiSummary: Maamoun Ghaibeh is a surgery specialist at Syrian American Medical Society. Based in Damascus.

timeline.title: Medical care in Syrian conflict zones
timeline.description: Organized underground hospitals and trained field medics in besieged Syrian cities
